headline: A Look At Expeditors (EXPD) Valuation After New US$3b Buyback And Earnings Beat
summary: Why Expeditors’ latest buyback and earnings beat matter for shareholders Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) has drawn fresh attention after authorizing a new US$3b share repurchase program and reporting Q4 2025 earnings and revenue that topped analyst estimates despite year over year declines. See our latest analysis for Expeditors International of Washington. At a share price of US$142.55, Expeditors’ recent 11.95% 1 month share price decline and 6.13% year to date share price...
